zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Bromwich於大約1341年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾時，他的父親Richard Bromwich27歲，母親Mrs. Richard Bromwich23歲。他於大約1364年與Elynor Pryce在英國賀福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1438年1月享年98歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾維奧布利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Bromwich于大约1341年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Richard Bromwich27岁，母亲Mrs. Richard Bromwich23岁。他于大约1364年与Elynor Pryce在英国賀福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1438年1月享年98岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾維奧布利。

nameMeanings.name: Bromwich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from West Bromwich (Staffs) or Castle and Little Bromwich (Warwicks).

variants.name: Bromage
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Worcestershire): habitational name from West Bromwich in Staffordshire, or Castle and Little Bromwich in Warwickshire, named in Old English with brōm ‘broom’ (the shrub) + wīc ‘outlying dairy farm’. Compare Brumage .

variants.name: Brimage
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Brumage  . This name is comparatively rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Bromwich was born about 1341, in Gloucestershire, England, his father, Richard Bromwich, was 27 and his mother, Mrs. Richard Bromwich, was 23. He married Elynor Pryce about 1364, in Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 7 daughters. He died in January 1438, at the age of 98, and was buried in Weobley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Bromwich est né environ 1341, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Bromwich, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Richard Bromwich, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elynor Pryce environ 1364, à Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en janvier 1438, à l’âge de 98 ans, et a été enterré à Weobley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Bromwich um 1341 in Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Bromwich 27 und seine Mutter Mrs. Richard Bromwich 23. Er hat um 1364 in Herefordshire, England Elynor Pryce geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 7 Töchter. Er starb im Januar 1438 im Alter von 98 Jahren und wurde in Weobley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Bromwich è nato il circa 1341 nel Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Richard Bromwich, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Richard Bromwich, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Elynor Pryce circa 1364, nel Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 7 figlie. Morì nel gennaio 1438, all'età di 98 anni, e fu sepolto a Weobley, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Bromwichが約1341年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Bromwichは27歳，母Mrs. Richard Bromwichは23歳であった。約1364年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでElynor Pryceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1438年1月に98歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウエオブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Bromwich(이)가 대략 1341년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Bromwich(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Richard Bromwich(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1364년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 Elynor Pryce(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1438년 1월 98세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 베오블리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Bromwich nasceu aproximadamente 1341, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Bromwich, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Richard Bromwich, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elynor Pryce aproximadamente 1364, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em janeiro de 1438, com 98 anos, e foi sepultado em Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Bromwich родился около 1341 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Bromwich было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Richard Bromwich, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elynor Pryce около 1364 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей. Он умер январь 1438 г. в возрасте 98 лет и был похоронен в местности веобли, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Elynor Pryce aproximadamente 1364, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 7 hijas. Murió en enero de 1438, a la edad de 98 años, y fue sepultado en Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
